_comment: Per-million-token USD prices used to derive cost from measured tokens (see docs/BENCHMARKING.md 4.2). All USD is imputed from tokens, not an invoice. Local/open models are priced at a reference hosted rate and clearly labelled 'imputed' in results. Update 'as_of' when prices change.

qwen2.5-coder:32b.source: reference hosted rate for a 32B open model
